info.name: HBnB API - exhaustive QA collection
info.description: Collection Postman générée à partir du code source HBnB fourni. Elle couvre les endpoints exposés, les validations, les permissions JWT, les scénarios de cycle de vie et plusieurs edge cases. Une requête 'BUG PROBE' est volontairement stricte pour faire ressortir une incohérence probable autour de review.user_id.

item.name: 00 - Bootstrap & Public checks
01. Login fails with wrong admin password

exec: pm.test('Error payload exists', function () { pm.expect(json.error || json.message).to.exist; });
pm.test('Seeded regular user login returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Regular user token is returned', function () { pm.expect(json.access_token).to.be.a('string'); });

item.description: Prépare les variables dynamiques, vérifie l'accès public et récupère les tokens de départ.

exec: pm.test('Non-admin cannot create users', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(403); });

item.name: 12. Admin cannot create user with invalid email -> 400

exec: pm.test('Invalid email is rejected', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(400); });
pm.test('Error payload exists', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.error || json.message).to.exist; });
pm.test('User response contains id and email', function () { pm.expect(json.id).to.be.a('string'); pm.expect(json.email).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('ownerEmail')); });
pm.test('Other user creation returns 201', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });
pm.test('Secondary admin creation returns 201', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });
pm.test('Returned user is the owner', function () { pm.expect(json.id).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('ownerUserId')); });

item.name: 22. Owner updates own first and last name

exec: pm.test('Owner email change is rejected', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(400); });

item.name: 24. Owner cannot change own password here -> 400

exec: pm.test('Owner password change through self endpoint is rejected', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(400); });
pm.test('Updating another user returns 403', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(403); });
pm.test('Admin email update returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Admin password update returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

item.name: 28. Login other user with updated credentials

exec: pm.test('Updated other user can log in', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

item.name: 29. Admin cannot set duplicate email on reviewer -> 400

exec: pm.test('Duplicate email update returns 400', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(400); });
pm.test('Secondary admin login returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Non-admin cannot create amenity', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(403); });
pm.test('Empty amenity name is rejected', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(400); });
pm.test('Amenity A creation returns 201', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });
pm.test('Amenity B creation returns 201', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });
pm.test('Returned amenity is amenity A', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json().id).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('amenityAId')); });
pm.test('Regular user update is forbidden', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(403); });

item.name: 40. Admin updates amenity with same name -> 200
41. Admin cannot update amenity with empty name -> 400

exec: pm.test('Empty update name returns 400', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(400); });

item.name: 42. Admin cannot rename amenity to duplicate name -> 400

exec: pm.test('Unknown amenity update returns 404', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(404); });
pm.test('Secondary admin can manage admin-only endpoint', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });

item.name: 47. Admin cannot create place with nonexistent owner -> 400
56. Owner creates main place with amenity

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Postman Main Place",
  "description": "Primary place used by the collection",
  "price": 123.45,
  "latitude": 48.1113,
  "longitude": -1.68,
  "owner_id": "{{ownerUserId}}",
  "amenities": [
    "{{amenityAId}}"
  ]
}

exec: pm.test('Main place creation returns 201', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });

pm.test('Response has owner object without password', function () { pm.expect(json.owner.id).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('ownerUserId')); pm.expect(json.owner).to.not.have.property('password'); });
pm.test('Boundary NE place returns 201', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });
pm.test('Boundary SW place returns 201', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });

item.name: 61. Main place reviews are initially empty

exec: pm.test('Place reviews endpoint returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('No reviews yet', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('array'); pm.expect(json.length).to.eql(0); });

item.name: 64. Owner cannot set invalid negative price -> 400
65. owner_id spoof is ignored on update

exec: pm.test('Spoofed owner_id update still returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Fields are updated', function () { pm.expect(json.title).to.eql('Postman Main Place Updated'); pm.expect(json.price).to.eql(150); });
pm.test('Boundary place title changed', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json().title).to.eql('Boundary SW Updated by Admin'); });
pm.test('Unknown place delete returns 404', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(404); });
pm.test('Boundary NE delete returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

item.name: 71. Deleted boundary NE place is gone -> 404

exec: pm.test('Owners cannot review their own place', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(400); });

pm.test('Review belongs to reviewer and place', function () { pm.expect(json.user_id).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('reviewerUserId')); pm.expect(json.place_id).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('placeId')); });

item.name: 81. BUG PROBE - spoofed user_id must be rejected -> expected 403

request.description: Ce test est volontairement strict. D'après l'intention métier et la suite unittest fournie, un user_id falsifié devrait être rejeté. Si ce test échoue, l'API ignore probablement user_id au lieu de le contrôler.

exec: pm.test('Supplying a mismatched user_id should return 403', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(403); });
pm.test('If this test fails, your endpoint is ignoring spoofed user_id instead of rejecting it', function () { pm.expect(true).to.eql(true); });

item.name: 82. Other user can also review the same main place

exec: pm.test('A second user can review the same place', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });

item.name: 83. Same reviewer cannot review the same place twice -> 400
84. Place review list contains both reviews

exec: pm.test('Place review list returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
const json = pm.response.json(); const ids = json.map(r => r.id);
pm.test('Two known reviews are present', function () { pm.expect(ids).to.include(pm.collectionVariables.get('reviewId')); pm.expect(ids).to.include(pm.collectionVariables.get('otherReviewId')); });
pm.test('Review id matches stored id', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json().id).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('reviewId')); });
pm.test('Empty review text returns 400', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(400); });
pm.test('Text and rating updated', function () { pm.expect(json.text).to.eql('Updated by the original reviewer'); pm.expect(json.rating).to.eql(4); });
pm.test('Admin review update returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Updated content is visible', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.text).to.eql('Admin touched this review'); pm.expect(json.rating).to.eql(5); });

item.name: 96. Non-author cannot delete other user's review -> 403
05 - Integration & cascade

exec: pm.test('Lifecycle place creation returns 201', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });
pm.test('Lifecycle review creation returns 201', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });

item.name: 103. Lifecycle place reviews list contains lifecycle review

exec: pm.test('Lifecycle place reviews returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Lifecycle review is present', function () { const ids = pm.response.json().map(r => r.id); pm.expect(ids).to.include(pm.collectionVariables.get('lifecycleReviewId')); });
pm.test('Lifecycle place delete returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Deleted lifecycle place returns 404', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(404); });
pm.test('Cascade delete removed the review', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(404); });

item.description: Valide le cycle complet et la suppression en cascade place -> reviews.
